tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within or close to normal limits, except for mildly elevated chloride and slightly decreased total CO₂, which may suggest a mild non-anion gap metabolic acidosis. Renal function, glucose, and electrolytes are otherwise unremarkable. Correlation with clinical context and further evaluation if symptoms are present is recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil

name.value: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
